name: Next.js AI App
description: Full-stack Next.js app wired with AI chat, streaming responses, and environment scaffolding.
whyItMatters: Sets up the AI chat plumbing from day one — streaming, API keys, and token handling — so you write features instead of boilerplate.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, mcp.json, install.sh, .env.example with OpenAI keys, and a SYSTEM_PROMPT.md tuned for web app context.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Your app's name, used in docs and prompts.

variables.label: Default Model
variables.description: Which OpenAI model to default to.

name: Python AI Agent
description: Autonomous Python agent with tool-calling, memory hooks, and a CLI entry point.
whyItMatters: Gives your Python agent a structured persona, tool manifest, and safety guidelines before you write a single line of logic.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, mcp.json, install.sh, .env.example, and a SYSTEM_PROMPT.md with Python-agent defaults.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Name of your Python agent project.

variables.label: Entry Point
variables.description: Main file name (e.g. main.py).

name: CLI Tool Starter
description: Scaffolds a developer CLI tool with AI-driven help text generation and automated release scripting.
whyItMatters: Copilot without CLI context guesses at your flag names. This template makes it follow your actual command structure from the first suggestion.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules, mcp.json, install.sh, and a SYSTEM_PROMPT.md describing CLI context and flag conventions.

variables.label: CLI Name
variables.description: The command name users will type.

name: RAG Application
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation app — document ingestion, vector search, and grounded Q&A.
whyItMatters: Configures your agent to cite sources, stay grounded, and refuse hallucinations — critical for any document-based AI product.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with retrieval guidelines, CLAUDE.md, mcp.json with memory server, install.sh, and .env.example for vector DB credentials.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Name of your RAG service.

variables.label: Vector Store
variables.description: Which vector DB you are using.

name: Copilot Coding Assistant
description: Tuned configuration for GitHub Copilot — code style rules, review checklists, and workspace instructions.
whyItMatters: Copilot without instructions guesses at your team's style. This template makes it follow your actual conventions from the first suggestion.
impact: Generates: .github/copilot-instructions.md with opinionated style rules, AGENTS.md, and a SYSTEM_PROMPT.md seeded with your project's coding philosophy.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Your repository or workspace name.

name: MCP Research Agent
description: Multi-tool research agent that browses the web, reads files, and synthesises findings.
whyItMatters: Connects multiple MCP tools into a single agent that can gather info from any source — web, local files, memory — without switching contexts.
impact: Generates: mcp.json with fetch + filesystem + memory servers, AGENTS.md with research persona, CLAUDE.md, install.sh, and SYSTEM_PROMPT.md.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Name for your research agent.

variables.label: Research Domain
variables.description: The subject area this agent specialises in (e.g. biotech, finance).

name: Design System Assistant
description: AI companion for designers — documents component specs, generates design tokens, and writes copy for UI states.
whyItMatters: Design decisions made in Figma are often lost in handoff. This agent captures intent, documents tokens, and drafts UI copy — bridging design and dev.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with design-focused persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md instructing the agent on design tokens and component language, and a STYLE_GUIDE.md template.

variables.label: Design System Name
variables.description: Name of your design system or product.

variables.label: Primary Brand Color
variables.description: Your brand's primary hex color (e.g. #6366F1).

name: QA & Test Automation Agent
description: Generates test plans, writes bug reports in structured format, and suggests regression scenarios from changelogs.
whyItMatters: QA gets an AI that speaks your bug-report format, understands your test taxonomy, and can draft regression suites from a list of changed files.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with QA-engineer persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md tuned for test case generation, BUG_REPORT_TEMPLATE.md, and TEST_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md.

variables.label: Project / App Name
variables.description: The product being tested.

variables.label: Test Framework
variables.description: Primary testing tool (e.g. Playwright, Cypress, Jest).

name: Product Manager Assistant
description: Writes PRDs, turns meeting notes into action items, and drafts stakeholder briefs — no code required.
whyItMatters: PMs spend hours formatting specs. This agent knows your product, your stakeholders, and can turn rough notes into polished PRD sections instantly.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with PM persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md for PRD and meeting-note context, PRD_TEMPLATE.md, and STAKEHOLDER_BRIEF_TEMPLATE.md.

variables.label: Product Name
variables.description: Name of your product or initiative.

variables.label: Target User
variables.description: One-line description of your primary user (e.g. 'SMB finance managers').

name: Marketing Content Agent
description: Generates on-brand copy, social posts, email sequences, and content calendar plans using your brand voice.
whyItMatters: Brand voice is hard to scale. This agent encodes your tone and audience so every AI output sounds like you, not generic ChatGPT.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with content strategist persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md encoding brand voice and audience, BRAND_VOICE.md guide, and CONTENT_CALENDAR_TEMPLATE.md.

variables.label: Brand / Product Name
variables.description: The brand this agent writes for.

variables.label: Brand Tone
variables.description: One or two adjectives describing your voice (e.g. 'friendly, expert').

name: Data Analyst Assistant
description: Helps analysts write SQL, interpret query results, draft data narratives, and document data dictionaries.
whyItMatters: Data analysts switch between tools constantly. This agent understands your warehouse schema and can explain query results in plain language for stakeholders.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with data-analyst persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md primed for SQL and data narrative generation, DATA_DICTIONARY_TEMPLATE.md, and install.sh.

variables.label: Project / Dataset Name
variables.description: Name of your analytics project or primary dataset.

variables.label: Data Warehouse
variables.description: Your primary database or warehouse (e.g. BigQuery, Snowflake, Postgres).

name: DevOps Platform Agent
description: CI/CD incident triage, runbook generation, and infrastructure cost commentary — for platform and SRE teams.
whyItMatters: On-call engineers need answers fast. This agent knows your infra stack and can draft runbooks, explain alerts, and spot misconfigurations automatically.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with SRE/DevOps persona, SYSTEM_PROMPT.md tuned for incident context, RUNBOOK_TEMPLATE.md, mcp.json, and install.sh.

variables.label: Service / Platform Name
variables.description: Name of your service or platform.

variables.label: Cloud Provider
variables.description: Your primary cloud (e.g. AWS, GCP, Azure).

name: Legal & Compliance Agent
description: AI assistant for drafting policies, reviewing contracts, and surfacing compliance risks — with audit-ready outputs.
whyItMatters: Legal teams spend hours reviewing routine documents. This agent can draft NDAs, check policy gaps, and flag risky clauses in seconds.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with legal-review persona, CONTRACT_REVIEW.md template, COMPLIANCE_CHECKLIST.md, mcp.json.

variables.label: Agent / Project Name
variables.description: Name of your legal AI agent.

variables.label: Primary Jurisdiction
variables.description: e.g. US (Delaware), EU (GDPR), UK

name: HR Onboarding Agent
description: Automates new-hire onboarding: generates welcome packets, FAQs, 30-60-90 day plans, and policy summaries.
whyItMatters: A smooth onboarding experience increases retention. This agent tailors welcome materials to role and team, saving HR hours per hire.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with HR-persona, WELCOME_PACKET.md, FAQ.md, ONBOARDING_PLAN.md.

variables.label: Agent / Project Name
variables.description: Name of your HR onboarding agent.

variables.label: Company Name
variables.description: Your organisation's name.

name: Sales Outreach Agent
description: Personalises cold outreach at scale — research prospects, draft emails, and generate follow-up sequences that convert.
stack: OpenAI Agents SDK, Python, Brave Search MCP
whyItMatters: Generic cold emails get ignored. This agent researches each prospect and crafts personalised messages that feel human.
impact: Generates: AGENTS.md with sales-copywriter persona, OUTREACH_TEMPLATE.md, FOLLOW_UP_SEQUENCE.md, mcp.json with Brave Search.

variables.label: Agent / Project Name
variables.description: Name of your sales outreach agent.

variables.label: Product / Service
variables.description: What you are selling.
